response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the intro and chorus of 'Connect the World' from the reference JSON, though this is a medley arrangement that includes a different verse ('next dimension'). I have discarded the unused Verse 1 and Pre-Chorus from the JSON and transcribed the new lyrics using the audio and on-screen burnt-in text as the absolute guide for spelling. The cinematic intro dialogue and the shout 'Coming in hot!' are included. Timing is strictly tied to the vocal audio waveform, with splits applied to maintain character limits and follow the Golden Rule.

subtitles.original: We're ready to greet the world,
subtitles.english: We're ready to greet the world,

subtitles.english: With courage to run toward a brand new start
